free_text: Collective states in the N=82 nuclide 141Pr excited
by the (alpha,alpha') reaction at 45 MeV
The 83-in. cyclotron.
Scattered particles were analyzed with a 180
deg., n=1/2 magnetic spectrograph and were detected
in Ilford K0 nuclear emulsion plates.
The target was prepared by evaporating praseodymium
metal from a tantalum boat into a ~50-mu-g/cm2 carbon
film. To minimize oxidation and changes in the target
thickness from sputtering, a ~10-mu-g/cm2 layer of
carbon was evaporated onto the Pr foil. The target
thickness was 0.40 mg/cm2 Pr.
DWBA calculations.
OG
Statistical errors.
Tab.II (p.1412)
No information on source of uncertainties.
